headline: China pushes Iran for safe passage through Strait of Hormuz
summary: Investing.com -- Crude oil prices pulled back and U.S. stock markets moved higher on Thursday afternoon following reports that China is in talks with Iran to secure safe passage for crude oil and liquefied natural gas vessels through the Strait of Hormuz. The discussions come as a U.S.-Israeli conflict with Tehran entered its sixth day. The market reaction to the news highlighted investor focus on shipping concerns in the region.

headline: Is Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Offering Value After Its Strong Year To Date Share Price Gain
summary: If you are wondering whether Colgate-Palmolive is fairly priced or if the current tag leaves some value on the table, you will want to look past the brand name and into what the numbers are really saying. The stock last closed at US$95.28, with a 1.4% decline over the past 7 days, a 3.7% gain over 30 days, a 22.6% return year to date, and a 6.4% return over 1 year, set against longer term 3 year and 5 year returns of 42.2% and 41.5% respectively. Recent coverage around Colgate-Palmolive has...

headline: What can Trump do to address energy prices? Strategist weighs in
summary: Investing.com -- The Trump administration is beginning to outline potential steps to address rising energy prices linked to the conflict involving Iran, though analysts at Wolfe Research say the government’s policy tools may be limited.

headline: U.S. macro risks ’likely limited unless pronounced oil spike’: BofA
summary: Investing.com -- The conflict between the U.S. and Iran has captured the attention of global markets, but analysts at Bank of America say the overall risk to the U.S. economy remains contained for now.

headline: 3 reasons why oil stocks could drop further
summary: Investing.com -- While oil equities have rallied strongly this year, they have declined in the last couple of sessions, with analysts at Bernstein saying the same forces that drove the gains could also trigger further declines.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Procter & Gamble, Colgate-Palmolive, BJ's Wholesale and Ollie's Bargain Outlet
summary: PG, CL, BJ and OLLI ride resilient demand for essential goods as consumer staples firms expand e-commerce, innovation and portfolio strategies to drive steady growth.
